# Simple Echo Test - Verify Basic Command Execution
# This is the most fundamental test structure
# Demonstrates: exec command, stdout assertion

# Test basic echo command output
exec echo "Hello, MCP!"
stdout "Hello, MCP!"

# Test echo with multiple words
exec echo "MCPScriptTest Framework"
stdout "Framework"
stdout "MCPScriptTest"

# Verify output doesn't contain unexpected content
! stdout "error"
! stdout "failed"
